member.name: T:Telegrator.Localized.DefaultCultureResolver
member.summary: A default implementation of that uses the standard language code from the user info.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Localized.ICultureResolver
member.summary: Service responsible for resolving the culture to use for localization based on the context of an incoming update.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Localized.ICultureResolver.ResolveAsync(Telegrator.Core.Handlers.IHandlerContainer)
member.summary: Resolves the asynchronously from the current container context.
member.param: The current handler container for the executing update.

member.name: P:Telegrator.Localized.ILocalizedHandler`1.LocalizationProvider
member.summary: Gets the localization provider associated with this handler.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Localized.ILocalizedMessageHandler
member.summary: Indicates that message handler utilizes localization

member.name: T:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedAspect
member.summary: A handler pre-processor that intercepts execution and sets the current culture context according to the .

member.name: M:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedAspect.#ctor(Telegrator.Localized.ICultureResolver)
member.param: The culture resolver used to get user language.

member.name: T:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedMessageHandlerExtensions
member.summary: Provides extension methods for localized message handlers.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedMessageHandlerExtensions.ResponseLocalized(Telegrator.Localized.ILocalizedHandler{Telegram.Bot.Types.Message},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Sends a localized response message using the handler's localization provider.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedMessageHandlerExtensions.ReplyLocalized(Telegrator.Localized.ILocalizedHandler{Telegram.Bot.Types.Message},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Sends a localized reply message using the handler's localization provider.

member.name: M:Telegrator.Localized.LocalizedMessageHandlerExtensions.Localize``1(Telegrator.Localized.ILocalizedHandler{``0},System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Gets the localized string for a specific key.
